overview.title: Overview
paragraphs: Network Flow integration uses Packetbeat's Flow feature to capture and aggregate network session data. Without configuring each protocol, you can get statistics on all TCP/UDP communications between hosts, helping you with traffic analysis, capacity planning, and security monitoring.

items.title: Traffic Statistics
items.description: Statistics on traffic distribution and trends by host, port, protocol

items.title: Connection Tracking
items.description: Record all network connection establishment, data transfer, and closure

items.title: Topology Visualization
items.description: Draw inter-host communication topology based on traffic data

items.title: Anomaly Detection
items.description: Identify abnormal traffic patterns, unauthorized connections, data exfiltration

fieldTables.title: Parsed Fields
fieldTables.description: Network flows will be parsed into the following structured fields:
